entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `chosenBandId` TEXT NOT NULL, `secondBandId` TEXT NOT NULL, `gatheringLevel` INTEGER NOT NULL, `gatheringXp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `cookingLevel` INTEGER NOT NULL, `cookingXp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `money` INTEGER NOT NULL, `discoveredRecipeIds` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `hasSeenFoodStructureHints` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `discoveredIngredientIds` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `hasSeenExperimentHint` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `hasSeenPostForageNudge` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `hasReceivedStarterPantry` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`ingredientId` TEXT NOT NULL, `grade` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `quantity` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(`ingredientId`, `grade`))
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`recipeId` TEXT NOT NULL, `grade` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `quantity` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(`recipeId`, `grade`))

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, 'placeholder_run_build_to_regenerate')
